## Label Legend

| Label | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| `spec-compliant` тЬЕ | SKILL.md passes agentskills.io validation |
| `spec-errors` тЭМ | SKILL.md found but fails validation |
| `multi-agent` ЁЯМР | Works across multiple agent products |
| `has-scripts` ЁЯУЬ | Contains a `scripts/` directory |
| `has-references` ЁЯУЪ | Contains a `references/` directory |
| `misleading` тЪая╕П | Topic tag used for SEO тАФ not actually an Agent Skill |
| `env-stealer` ЁЯЪи | **Confirmed:** scripts exfiltrate environment variables |
| `env-stealer?` тЪая╕П | **Unverified:** suspicious pattern, needs human review |
| `rm-rf` ЁЯТе | **Confirmed:** destructive `rm -rf` on root, home, or wildcard |
| `rm-rf?` тЪая╕П | **Unverified:** `rm -rf $VAR` тАФ may be safe, needs human review |
| `archived` ЁЯЧДя╕П | Repository is archived |
| `stale` ЁЯТд | No commits in 6+ months |
| `no-license` ЁЯФУ | No LICENSE file found |
